arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Arne Slot's side 'have advantage' over Newcastle in race for Virgil van Dijk replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly ahead of fellow Premier League side Newcastle United in the race to sign a La Liga centre-back who is valued at around £20m.

arts.ttl: Klopp hopes 'fantastic' Salah stays at Liverpool
arts.sum: Former Liverpool manager Jürgen Klopp has said he hopes Mohamed Salah stays at the club, labelling him the best striker they have had in modern times.

arts.ttl: Benfica set to issue official Darwin Nunez update on this date as £72m Liverpool bonanza confirmed
Jurgen Klopp breaks silence on Mohamed Salah Liverpool future as 'biggest' contract message sent
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp has been speaking about Mohamed Salah's Liverpool future

arts.ttl: Curtis Jones makes damning Jurgen Klopp claim with Arne Slot difference explained
arts.sum: A comment made by Liverpool midfielder Curtis Jones on the difference of working under Arne Slot compared to Jurgen Klopp has come to light via Rio Ferdinand

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs. Liverpool: How Arne Slot can beat Nuno Espirito Santo to keep Premier League title advantage
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot is looking for revenge on Tuesday evening when his side take on Nottingham Forest in the Premier League at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds to include in-demand teenager in package to sign Bournemouth's Antoine Semenyo?
arts.sum: Liverpool will reportedly consider using an in-demand teenager as part of a transfer package to sign Bournemouth attacker Antoine Semenyo.
